reviews.comment:
Malísima atención , espere 10' al playero, ni el de seguridad sabía dónde estaba. Te toman el tiempo.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. I waited 10 minutes for the attendant. Not even security knew where I was. They're just taking your time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUR3dUxhQnRBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es una atención mala y desconforme de todo tipo
Te hacen esperar mucho tiempo el café frío y desconsian de vos que no pagas haciendo mal su trabajo mala atenciones quisiera que me devuelvan la plata del café que page

(Translated by Google)
The service is terrible and I'm completely dissatisfied. They make you wait a long time for cold coffee and they're suspicious of you because you don't pay, doing a poor job. I'd like a refund for the coffee I paid for.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUR3a0lfS2l3RRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
I always come here, the service is very good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUN3OHRyLWlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Le he hecho el service al auto allí y 10/10, Los Playeros en su mayoría prestan muy buen servicio y atención, el autolavado quizás les falte un poco en el aspirado pero por lo demás, creo que es una de las mejores estaciones de servicio de Buenos Aires.

(Translated by Google)
I've had my car serviced there and it's 10/10. Los Playeros, for the most part, provide very good service and attention. The car wash might be a little lacking in the vacuuming department, but otherwise, I think it's one of the best service stations in Buenos Aires.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUN3N1B2ckVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Linda estación de servicio, bastante completa. La atención para realizar el permiso internacional de conducir es muy amable

(Translated by Google)
Nice, well-equipped service station. The staff who handle the international driving permit application are very friendly.
